description: First wave: catalog-driven RBAC + dmux-workflows scaffolding + project docs.
launcherCommand: bash -lc 'echo "[worker] {task_file} ready in {worktree_path}"; echo "--- handoff: {handoff_file} ---"; echo "--- status: {status_file} ---"; sleep 86400'

workers.name: rbac-catalog
workers.task:
Audit the RBAC catalogs for completeness:
  - server/rbac/permissions.js (300+ keys, 18 categories)
  - server/rbac/roles.js (24 system roles, hierarchy, MFA, sessions)
  - server/rbac/matrix.js (38 permission sets)
  - server/rbac/roleMatrix.js (role → PS map)
  - server/rbac/guards.js (FLS, RLS, session, impersonation)
Run the test suite: `node --test test/rbac.test.js` and confirm 45/45 pass.
Add new permission keys or sets for: manufacturing (mfg.*), marketing automation (mrkt.*), compliance (compliance.*), AI agents (ai.agent.*), and tenant management. Keep Owner implicit-all and Admin restricted. Add tests for every new key. Commit, then write handoff.md describing what you added and which tests pass.

workers.name: dmux-workflows
workers.task:
Build the dmux-style orchestration scaffolding for A1-ERP-HY:
  - scripts/tmux-worktree-orchestrator.js (shared helper: createWorktree, overlaySeedPaths, writeWorkerFiles, launchTmuxPane, capturePaneOutput, killSession)
  - scripts/orchestrate-worktrees.js (CLI runner that reads a plan.json, validates it, creates worktrees, writes per-worker task/handoff/status files, and launches tmux panes)
  - .orchestration/README.md (plan.json schema, placeholders, usage)
  - docs/DMUX_WORKFLOWS.md (operational guide, patterns in use, recovery, cleanup)
Support flags: --dry-run, --execute, --no-tmux. Validate the plan schema (sessionName, baseRef, workers[].name, workers[].task). Make all helpers idempotent. Commit, then write handoff.md describing the file layout, the API surface, and an example invocation.

workers.name: docs-and-status
workers.task:
Write the canonical project documentation:
  - docs/RBAC_SYSTEM.md (15 sections: goals, concepts, hierarchy, catalog, permission sets, roles, sensitivity & MFA, FLS, RLS, session & impersonation, API reference, custom roles, migration, comparison with Salesforce/NetSuite/Odoo, operational runbook)
  - docs/PROJECT_STATUS.md (snapshot of the first wave: RBAC stack, test results, dmux scaffolding, pending phases 0–9, open questions, how to run the test suite, how to use the RBAC module)
  - .orchestration/a1-erp-hy-initial.json (first-wave plan: 3 workers, seedPaths, baseRef, launcherCommand)
Both docs should be readable standalone and cross-link to each other and to docs/ERP_COMPARISON_IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md. Commit, then write handoff.md with a table of contents for both docs.
